## Talent is a combination of core traits and acquired skills

Assessing both is the backbone of a comprehensive pre-employment assessment strategy

### Core traits

![]()

Personality

#### Personality traits

Characteristic patterns of thoughts, behaviors, cognition and emotions specific to each individual

![]()

Behavioral

#### Behavioral tendencies

Task-Related Behaviors Critical for a Successful Performance at the Workplace

![]()

Cognitive

#### Cognitive ability

Reasoning And Problem-solving Skills Required For A Candidate To Perform The Job

![]()

Infographic

### Acquired skills

![]()

Acquired-Skills

#### Domain skills

Specific Role-based Knowledge And Technical Competence

![]()

Coding-Skills

#### Coding skills

Right Coding Knowledge And The Ability To Solve Problems Through Code

![]()

Communication-Skills

#### Communication skills

The Ability To Convey One’s Thoughts Meaningfully In The Language Used

Mercer | Mettl Talent Assessments

## Mercer | Mettl pre-employment assessments

Mercer | Mettl offers holistic pre-employment assessment tools to scientifically measure core traits as well as acquired skills of candidates. Our suite of tools consists of personality assessments, behavioral assessments, cognitive assessments, technical assessments, coding assessments and communication skills assessments.

## Frequently asked questions (FAQs)

A pre-employment assessment or a pre-emloyment exam is a standardized approach to collect the necessary information about job applicants and crosschecking whether the information matches their hands-on skills to make hiring decisions. Many organizations employ pre-employment screening test to design a more effective talent development strategy.

Yes. Mercer | Mettl’s platform allows you to create fully tailored assessments for different job roles, industries, and seniority levels. From adjusting the difficulty to incorporating job-specific scenarios and competencies, every pre-employment assessment can be aligned with the exact skills and communication requirements you’re looking for in a candidate. This ensures you’re assessing what truly matters for success in the role.

The different types of pre-employment assessment tests are personality tests, behavioral assessments, cognitive ability tests, coding tests, role-based tests, remote work assessments, high-potential identification, learning agility, language proficiency tests, background checks and drug tests.

Pre-employment testing is significantly beneficial for human resource professionals as it allows them to make evidence-based hiring decisions. When used with psychometric, cognitive, technical and other screening tools, online pre-employment testing reduces the turnaround time and enables organizations to shortlist top talent efficiently.

Yes, Mercer | Mettl is a globally recognized and trusted provider of pre-employment assessments. The platform is used by more than 6000 organizations across 100 countries. With AI-assisted remote proctoring, an extensive bank of questions and assessments and the ability to customize tests as per your need, the platform delivers reliable, bias-free insights that help you identify the right talent quickly and confidently.
